configurations.name: macOS
configurations.//1: Explicit include paths + defines instead of compileCommands. CMake's universal-binary build emits '-arch arm64 -arch x86_64' which the Microsoft C/C++ IntelliSense engine cannot consume in a single AST — falling back to defaults and surfacing fake 'HexCore.h not found' errors. The clangd extension uses macos/.clangd separately, which already strips those flags.
configurations.//2: compilerPath lets the extension query clang++ for the default system include paths (libc++ in particular) so that std::clamp / std::min / etc. resolve without the extension guessing where the C++17 stdlib lives. Without this the include search uses the extension's bundled defaults which don't always match the active Xcode toolchain.
